unitName: 走進酷貓咖啡室 | A visit to Cool Cat Cafe

article.title: A visit to Cool Cat Cafe 走進酷貓咖啡廳

paragraphs.english: Hello readers! Have you heard of cat cafes? These are cafes with lots of cats. The cats walk around and visitors can play with them.
sentences: Hello readers!
Have you heard of cat cafes?
These are cafes with lots of cats.
The cats walk around and visitors can play with them.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 讀者們好！你們聽過貓咖啡廳嗎？這些就是有很多貓的咖啡廳。貓咪們走來走去，訪客可以和牠們玩耍。
translation_sentences: 🌐 讀者們好！
你們聽過貓咖啡廳嗎？
這些就是有很多貓的咖啡廳。
貓咪們走來走去，訪客可以和牠們玩耍。

implication.english: 💡 The blogger introduces the concept of cat cafes, explaining what they are.
implication.chinese: 💡 部落客介紹貓咖啡廳的概念，解釋什麼是貓咖啡廳。[換句話說]：大家好，你們知道什麼是貓咖啡廳嗎？就是那種有很多貓咪可以互動的咖啡廳。

paragraphs.english: I learnt about cat cafes in winter, but I didn't visit one until spring because I was too busy.
sentences: I learnt about cat cafes in winter, but I didn't visit one until spring because I was too busy.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 我在冬天就聽說過貓咖啡廳，但直到春天才去參觀，因為我太忙了。
translation_sentences: 🌐 我在冬天就聽說過貓咖啡廳，但直到春天才去參觀，因為我太忙了。

implication.english: 💡 The blogger explains the delay between knowing about cat cafes and actually visiting one.
implication.chinese: 💡 部落客解釋了知道貓咖啡廳和實際去參觀之間的時間差。[換句話說]：其實我冬天就知道有貓咖啡廳了，但太忙了，拖到春天才去。

paragraphs.english: On 3 April, I finally went to Cool Cat Cafe with my mum and my brother. This cat in the photo is called Marbles. She was very friendly and playful.
sentences: On 3 April, I finally went to Cool Cat Cafe with my mum and my brother.
This cat in the photo is called Marbles.
She was very friendly and playful.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 四月三日，我終於和媽媽、弟弟一起去了酷貓咖啡廳。照片裡的這隻貓叫馬布爾斯。她非常友善又好動。
translation_sentences: 🌐 四月三日，我終於和媽媽、弟弟一起去了酷貓咖啡廳。
照片裡的這隻貓叫馬布爾斯。
她非常友善又好動。

implication.english: 💡 The blogger shares when they visited and introduces a specific cat they met.
implication.chinese: 💡 部落客分享何時造訪，並介紹他們遇到的一隻貓。[換句話說]：四月三日終於去了！照片裡這隻是馬布爾斯，牠很親人也很愛玩。

paragraphs.english: We booked a spot at 12 noon and we arrived right on time. We stayed from 12 noon to 1.30 p.m.
sentences: We booked a spot at 12 noon and we arrived right on time.
We stayed from 12 noon to 1.30 p.m.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 我們預訂了中午12點的位子，並且準時到達。我們從中午12點待到下午1點半。
translation_sentences: 🌐 我們預訂了中午12點的位子，並且準時到達。
我們從中午12點待到下午1點半。

implication.english: 💡 Details the booking and timing of their visit.
implication.chinese: 💡 詳細說明預訂和造訪時間。[換句話說]：我們有預約，12點準時到，待了一個半小時。

paragraphs.english: When we arrived, we sat down at a table next to the window and ordered some drinks. I'm not a big fan of tea or coffee, so I ordered a strawberry smoothie.
sentences: When we arrived, we sat down at a table next to the window and ordered some drinks.
I'm not a big fan of tea or coffee, so I ordered a strawberry smoothie.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 抵達後，我們坐在靠窗的桌子，點了些飲料。我不太喜歡茶或咖啡，所以我點了一杯草莓冰沙。
translation_sentences: 🌐 抵達後，我們坐在靠窗的桌子，點了些飲料。
我不太喜歡茶或咖啡，所以我點了一杯草莓冰沙。

implication.english: 💡 Describes the seating and drink order, showing the cafe atmosphere.
implication.chinese: 💡 描述座位和點餐，顯示咖啡廳的氛圍。[換句話說]：我們選了窗邊的位子，我不愛喝茶或咖啡，就點了草莓冰沙。

paragraphs.english: Do you like adult cats or kittens? Personally, I prefer adult cats. There were several of them up for adoption at the cafe. I asked my mum if we could adopt one of these cats, but she said 'no'.
sentences: Do you like adult cats or kittens?
Personally, I prefer adult cats.
There were several of them up for adoption at the cafe.
I asked my mum if we could adopt one of these cats, but she said 'no'.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 你喜歡成貓還是小貓？就我個人而言，我比較喜歡成貓。咖啡廳裡有好幾隻成貓開放領養。我問媽媽我們能不能領養其中一隻，但她說不行。
translation_sentences: 🌐 你喜歡成貓還是小貓？
就我個人而言，我比較喜歡成貓。
咖啡廳裡有好幾隻成貓開放領養。
我問媽媽我們能不能領養其中一隻，但她說不行。

implication.english: 💡 The blogger expresses preference for adult cats and mentions adoption, hinting at a desire to adopt.
implication.chinese: 💡 部落客表達對成貓的偏好，並提到領養，暗示想領養的願望。[換句話說]：我比較喜歡成貓，剛好那裡有幾隻可以領養，我問媽媽能不能養，她說不行。

paragraphs.english: I wanted to stay there longer, but I had swimming class at 2 p.m. When I left the cafe, I was really happy! All the cats really cheered me up.
sentences: I wanted to stay there longer, but I had swimming class at 2 p.m.
When I left the cafe, I was really happy!
All the cats really cheered me up.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 我想待久一點，但我下午2點有游泳課。離開咖啡廳時，我真的很開心！所有的貓真的讓我心情大好。
translation_sentences: 🌐 我想待久一點，但我下午2點有游泳課。
離開咖啡廳時，我真的很開心！
所有的貓真的讓我心情大好。

implication.english: 💡 Despite having to leave, the experience was positive and uplifting.
implication.chinese: 💡 雖然必須離開，但這次經驗是正面且令人振奮的。[換句話說]：雖然很想多待一會兒，但要去上游泳課了。不過離開時心情超好，被貓咪療癒了。

paragraphs.english: I have an English test coming up in two days. If I do well in this test, maybe Mum will let me adopt a cat!
sentences: I have an English test coming up in two days.
If I do well in this test, maybe Mum will let me adopt a cat!
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 我兩天後有英文考試。如果我考得好，也許媽媽會讓我養貓！
translation_sentences: 🌐 我兩天後有英文考試。
如果我考得好，也許媽媽會讓我養貓！

implication.english: 💡 The blogger ends with a hopeful note, linking good performance to a possible reward.
implication.chinese: 💡 部落客以充滿希望的語句作結，將好表現與可能的獎勵連結。[換句話說]：兩天後要考英文，如果考得好，說不定媽媽就會答應讓我養貓了！
